positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    creed_brothers != ivy_nile).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    roderick_strong != creed_brothers).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    diamond_mine != ivy_nile).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    roderick_strong != ivy_nile).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    diamond_mine != imperium).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    diamond_mine != roderick_strong).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    diamond_mine != creed_brothers).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    creed_brothers != imperium).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ivy_nile != imperium).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    roderick_strong != imperium).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define pw_stable(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define leads(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define includes(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define feud(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. pw_stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(axiom)]
5. feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
7. ? [X0] : (pw_stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & feud(imperium,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~? [X0] : (pw_stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & feud(imperium,X0)) [negated conjecture 7]
10. ! [X0] : (~pw_stable(X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~feud(imperium,X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
11. pw_stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 1]
13. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 4]
14. feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
25. ~feud(imperium,X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~pw_stable(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
26. ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) | ~pw_stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 14,25]
27. ~pw_stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 26,13]
28. $false [forward subsumption resolution 27,11]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
